name: Risotto Florentine
recipeIngredient: Nonfat Cooking Spray or 1 tbsp FF Margarine
1 clove garlic, crushed (store bought minced also works well)
1/2 tsp saffron threads or 1/4 tsp ground turmeric
1 can cannellini beans, rinsed and drained (15-16 ounces)
10 ounce package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed to drain
1/4 cup grated fat-free Parmesan cheese (optional - tastes great without the cheese too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 10-inch skillet with cooking spray.
2. Cook garlic and onion over medium-high heat for about 2 minutes until onion is crisp-tender.
3. Add rice and stir to coat with onion-garlic mixture.
4. Stir in broth and saffron.
5. Heat to boiling; stir once thoroughly, then reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until rice is almost tender and liquid is absorbed.
7. Stir in remaining ingredients.
8. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
